research_intent.raw_user_input: TGF-beta has tumor-suppressive roles in early cancer but promotes EMT, invasion, and metastasis in advanced cancer.
research_intent.research_goal: Understand the dual role of TGF-beta in cancer progression, specifically how it acts as a tumor suppressor in early stages but promotes epithelial-mesenchymal transition (EMT), invasion, and metastasis in advanced cancer.

domain_routing.reasoning_summary: The query describes the dual role of TGF-beta signaling in cancer progression, which is a pathway mechanism involving activation and downstream phenotypic outcomes. It aligns with pathway biology key relation types such as pathway_activation. General biomedical also fits as a fallback.
